description: Fetch one automation by ID. Optionally include a normalized branch graph with stable branch and step IDs.

automation_id.description: Automation identifier returned by `list_automations`, `get_automation`, or automation write previews.
automation_id.title: Automation Id

include_branches.description: When true, include the normalized branch and step graph with stable IDs in the automation response.
include_branches.title: Include Branches

kind.description: Configured automation kind, for example `workflow`. Discover supported values with `list_automation_kinds`.
kind.title: Kind

name: get_automation
